title: Spicy Khao Pad with Tofu
description: A quick and easy Thai-inspired stir-fry with crispy tofu and flavorful sauce. Serve over a bed of rice for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.amount: 1 block, drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat 1 tsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Thai Red Curry Paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cubed tofu and stir-fry until golden brown.
Add the chopped Thai Basil and toasted peanuts, stir-fry for an additional minute.
Stir in the Pad Thai Sauce and cook for 2-3 minutes or until heated through.
Serve the spicy tofu mixture over a bed of cooked khao and enjoy!
Garnish with additional chopped basil and peanuts if desired.
